report: Rapid Threat Containment (C2 — Stage A + Stage B)

ise35.role: PSN — policy decision point + CoA origin (UDP 1700) + pxGrid controller

FTDv.health: red (Eth0/1 idle no-packets — cosmetic; isConnected=true, MANAGED, DEPLOYED)

host-catc.role: Stage B trigger dest (blocked by FTD)

cases.objective: ANC policy + quarantine authz rule + deny SGACL cell exist

evidence.authz_rule: ANC_Quarantine (14dd6556-babc-4fd1-b535-bfb604e7691a) rank 0 Session:ANCPolicy EQUALS Quarantine -> Quarantined_Systems

evidence.edge1: Authorized, SGT Value 4, VRF CAMPUS_VN, session 0217010A000000116F9206AE
evidence.ise: alice active, Employees SGT 4, PermitAccess, rule Employees_SGT, PEAP(EAP-MSCHAPv2), store mitchcloud

cases.objective: ANC apply issues a CoA sourced from ANC

evidence.coa: MnT AuthStatus msg 5205 Dynamic Authorization succeeded, Error-Cause=200, 10:27:42Z, audit-session 0217010A000000116F9206AE
evidence.attribution: CoASourceComponent=ANC / CoAReason=Quarantine per ANC policy / Cisco CoA UDP 1700 / Acct-Terminate-Cause=Admin Reset (prior-validated live-session detail; identical CoA)

evidence.supplicant: wpa_state COMPLETED, PAE AUTHENTICATED, suppPortStatus Authorized, EAP SUCCESS, EAP-PEAP
evidence.edge1: Authorized, SGT Value 4, IPv4 172.16.10.50 relearned, session 0217010A000000126F9FBCA7
evidence.ise: alice active, Employees SGT 4, PermitAccess, rule Employees_SGT

cases.note: objects configured & verified but not exercised: the quarantine CoA terminated the session instead of re-admitting into SGT 255; host supplicant stayed down until release. Stronger isolation than the SGACL path.

cases.objective: FMC correlation + remediation objects exist and are active

evidence.note: FMC correlation/remediation are GUI-only (not in FMC REST API) so verified functionally by the live auto-fire (RTC-011..013) + module doc
evidence.trigger_rule: SDA-ACP AccessRule 'Deny-CAMPUS-to-CatC' (5254002E-...-000268434435) BLOCK src net-campus10/inside -> dst host-catc/outside, sendEventsToFMC=true, logBegin=true
evidence.objects: remediation instance ISE-ANC-Quarantine; remediation Quarantine-Source (ANC Policy for Source -> Quarantine); correlation rule Quarantine-on-CatC-Deny (connection event, AC Rule Name contains Deny-CAMPUS-to-CatC); correlation policy RTC-Quarantine ACTIVE

cases.objective: blocked FTD event auto-applies ANC (no human)

evidence.trigger: HOST1->host-catc 198.18.128.5: ping 100% loss; nc 443/80/22 rc=1; wget 'Host is unreachable' (all blocked by Deny-CAMPUS-to-CatC)
evidence.auto_anc: NO ise_apply_anc called; within seconds ise_list_anc_endpoints non-empty -> 49356d5a-337a-42c1-80b4-f7c75f168a81 -> macAddress 52:54:00:03:0B:0D, policyName Quarantine

cases.objective: auto-applied ANC fires a CoA against alice's live session

evidence.coa: MnT AuthStatus msg 5205 Dynamic Authorization succeeded, Error-Cause=200, 10:31:56Z, audit-session 0217010A000000126F9FBCA7 (alice's live session)
evidence.attribution: same CoASourceComponent=ANC / CoAReason=Quarantine per ANC policy CoA as Stage A

evidence.ise: alice active, count=1, Employees SGT 4, PermitAccess, rule Employees_SGT
evidence.pings: both dests 0% loss (172.16.20.10 after ~30s LISP reconverge)

caveats: RTC-007: soft SGT/SGACL re-admission path configured but not exercised (quarantine CoA terminates the session — stronger isolation).

The literal live-session 'CoASourceComponent=ANC' string was not sampleable post-termination this run (session dropped from the active list before it could be read); the CoA is proven by MnT msg 5205 + the auto-created ANC binding + active-count 0, and the attribution string is carried from the prior validated run of the identical CoA.
notes: RTC-Quarantine correlation policy left ACTIVE (re-quarantines any HOST1->host-catc attempt — that is the feature).
host console user is 'cisco' not root; sudo -n wpa_cli reassociate restored the supplicant both times.
allow ~15-30s LISP EID reconvergence (inter-VN hairpin to SHARED-SVC returns last).
no built config modified; only reversible ANC round-trips + trigger traffic, all undone, alice verified restored.
